data.title: Nanmono Ii jan
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Nanmono Ii jan by Nanmono All Stars. The song was featured as the ending for Gekkan! Nanmono Anime.

data.title: Hirayasumi
data.synopsis:
Living in Asagaya, 29-year-old Hiroto Ikuta spends his days working at his part-time job and chatting with the locals. He likes visiting Hanae Wada most, a grumpy yet kind elderly woman whom Hiroto calls "Granny." Hiroto's time with Granny is sadly cut short when she passes away from a heart attack. To his surprise, Hiroto inherits Granny's house as she never married or had children.

Three months later, 18-year-old Natsumi Kobayashi moves from her hometown to attend art school. With nowhere else to go, she stays with her cousin Hiroto, whom she has not seen in years. Despite their opposing personalities, the pair begin living under the same roof as they struggle through their seemingly mundane lives.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

My Stepmother and Stepsisters Do Not Pick On Me
いびってこない義母と義姉
My Mother-in-Law and Sister-in-Law Who Don't Bully Me.

data.title: Ibitte Konai Gibo to Gishi
data.title_english: My Mother-in-Law and Sister-in-Law Who Don't Bully Me.
data.title_japanese: いびってこない義母と義姉
title_synonyms: My Stepmother and Stepsisters Aren't Wicked
My Stepmother and Stepsisters Do Not Pick On Me
data.synopsis:
Miya is the illegitimate child of a certain prominent family. When her mother dies, she's convinced she knows what awaits her in her new home: a life of servitude and misery at the hands of her wicked stepmother and stepsisters! Yet when she finally meets the women she expects to treat her like dirt, they actually end up being...sweet?!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titles.title: Kanojo ga Separate wo Matou Riyuu
彼女がセパレートをまとう理由

data.title: Kanojo ga Separate wo Matou Riyuu
data.title_japanese: 彼女がセパレートをまとう理由
data.synopsis:
Amane Kojou, a virgin girl frustrated with her chaste boyfriend who only kisses her, channels her energy into the track and field club. However, her strong sexual desire, typical of an athlete, fuels her growing frustration. To make matters worse, a middle-aged man can’t stop staring at her provocative athletic uniform.

Living alone in an apartment, Amane indulges in nightly masturbation. Unbeknownst to her, the middle-aged landlord secretly records her behavior!

In exchange for deleting the videos, he demands a one-sided physical relationship.

Though unwanted, Amane’s unsatisfied body begins to crave the man’s touch more and more… What will become of Amane?! 

(Source: AniDB)

titles.title: Synapusyu The Movie: Pushu Hoppe Dancing Party
シナぷしゅ THE MOVIE ぷしゅほっぺダンシングPARTY

data.title: Synapusyu The Movie: Pushu Hoppe Dancing Party
data.title_japanese: シナぷしゅ THE MOVIE ぷしゅほっぺダンシングPARTY
data.synopsis:
Pushupushu and Nyu are excited about going on vacation for the first time in a long time. When they arrive at the airport of Acorn Island, a new friend who looks just like Nyu livens up the mood with upbeat welcome music. Her name is Party! Pushupushu is engrossed in the rhythm, but in the process, one of his cheeks flies away somewhere. Will Pushupushu be able to get his cheek back at the end of this great adventure?! Find the cheeks! Let's dance!

(Source: Official site, translated)

data.title: Storm
data.synopsis:
Yumi, a job-hunting student whose search is not going well, is walking around town when she is suddenly blown high into the sky by a strong wind. When she wakes up, she finds herself flying. What is the view she sees?

(Source: YouTube, translated)
data.background: Student Work 2017 from Mai Shizuse, Osaka University of Arts.

data.title: Chika☆Chika Idol PV
data.synopsis:
Animated PV for Chika☆Chika Idol kickstarter project.

Portrays the lives of girls that are members of the "underground idol" group Patisserie. Underground idols, also called live idols and indie idols, are idols who focus on live performances instead of mass media exposure.

data.title_japanese: こまねこのかいがいりょこう
data.synopsis:
Koma is delighted to hear the news of a big journey ahead. She would like to take her two cuddly toys with her, but her father dissuades her, arguing that her precious friends could be lost or stolen. Separation then seems inevitable…

(Source: Black Movie Festival)

data.title: Zi Chuan 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
To clear suspicion, words are the weakest defense. True power speaks for itself! General Zichuan Xiu, who once single-handedly executed a traitor of the Zichuan clan within the Demon Clan's stronghold, has risen to command hundreds of thousands of allied troops in the Far East. Supported by the Guardian Elders of the Sacred Temple, this warrior now ascends as the new sovereign of the Eastern lands: The Bright King is crowned!

(Source: WeTV)

data.synopsis:
Follows Katsuko Yoshida, a woman rumored to be the cousin of Yoshida-kun, the combat chief of the Secret Society Eagle Talon. The story focuses on gender issues in the home and climate change.

(Source: TV Asahi, translated)

data.title: SI-VIS: The Sound of Heroes
data.synopsis:
SI-VIS is a co-ed music group, led by Yosuke, shaking up the global music scene with their unmatched vocals and performances. However, they are actually heroes in disguise, battling against mysterious forces threatening the world. They convert audience energy at live performances into combat power. Luckily, the battles appear to be ordinary concerts to the public, keeping their identity a secret.

(Source: Crunchyroll)
